title: CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER - 211info
text: ABC HOUSE CHILD ADVOCACY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assessments, support services, medical evaluations and forensic evaluations for suspected child abuse victims. Also provides off-site therapy and counseling referrals, and advocacy services. 228 SW 5th Avenue Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Children ages 0-18 who are affected by physical or sexual abuse, at risk of being abused, or have directly experienced abuse and their families. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm, by appointment only Email (541) 926-2203 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 926-2203 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information, most services require a referral from the Oregon Department of Human Services (ODHS) or law enforcement FEES: Varies by service. No one is turned away for inability to pay DOCUMENTS: Varies by service. Referral from ODHS or law enforcement may be required for some services. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties Services: Case/Care Management * At Risk Families Child Abuse Counseling Child Abuse Medical Evaluations Child Abuse Prevention Child Advocacy Centers Therapy Referrals * Child Abuse Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - COMMUNITY EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ABC HOUSE
